seoTitle: Upper Capel vs Upper Swan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Capel and Upper Swan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Capel vs Upper Swan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Capel and Upper Swan.
heading: Upper Capel vs Upper Swan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Capel, Western Australia and Upper Swan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Capel has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Upper Swan (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Capel or Upper Swan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Capel has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Upper Swan scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Capel scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Swan scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Capel or Upper Swan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Capel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
